prompt: A minimalist abstract logo mark for a hypothetical AI infrastructure startup called "VECTRA". Geometric mark: a single continuous line forming a stylized upward arrow that loops elegantly into a circle at its base, suggesting iteration and ascent. Two-tone: deep indigo #2a2d6e primary and a single warm amber #f4a020 accent dot at the top of the arrow. Flat vector style, sharp clean edges, no gradients. The wordmark "VECTRA" is rendered to the right of the symbol in a clean modern geometric sans-serif, slight letter-spacing, deep indigo. White background, generous padding, centered overall composition.
